Creative AI Process — Polly Pocket Series

Seven Worlds.
One Compact.

A series of AI-generated Polly Pocket compacts — each one a different version of me, reimagined in the style of the original vintage toy using Claude and Gemini.

🎀 Polly Pocket Aesthetic 🤖 AI Image Generation ✍️ Prompt Engineering 🪞 Self Portrait Series

The Concept

Different Versions of Me, in Miniature

The idea started with a simple reference: a photo of a real vintage Polly Pocket compact — that iconic heart-shaped case with the tiny figure inside. From there, I gave Claude a series of themes that represent different parts of my personality and world, and asked it to translate each one into a detailed image prompt.

The result is a self-portrait series — not painted or photographed, but miniaturized. Each compact is a different facet: the dreamer, the nerd, the mystic, the explorer, the unfiltered self.

The Process

How Each Compact Was Made

📸

Step 1 — The Reference Image

I found a photo of a real vintage Polly Pocket compact and shared it with Claude. This became the visual anchor — every prompt had to match that specific toy aesthetic: the heart-shaped case, tiny molded figures, intricate miniature scenes.

💬

Step 2 — Theme Directions

I gave Claude a theme for each compact — mermaid, princess, tech girl, astrology, alien, crazy me, and cannabis — and described the feeling or world I wanted each one to capture.

✍️

Step 3 — Claude Wrote the Prompts

Claude translated each theme into a detailed image generation prompt that preserved the vintage Polly Pocket aesthetic while building a fully realized miniature world around each concept.

🖼️

Step 4 — Generated in Gemini

Each prompt went into Google Gemini, which produced the final images — capturing that unmistakable molded plastic, pastel miniature world feel of the original toy in completely new scenes.

The Series

All Seven Compacts

Each compact represents a different version of me — a different world I'd live in, a different side of my personality made miniature.

🧜‍♀️ Ocean Me
A pastel underwater world with coral reefs, tropical fish, sea creatures, and a mermaid figure holding a pearl. The shell bed and aquarium wall in the lid capture a world I'd actually want to live in forever.
Mermaid · Ocean · Fantasy
👑 Princess Me
A dreamy pink and pastel compact with a figure in a big ballgown, a rainbow bedroom, vanity, unicorn, and a garden gazebo. Soft, magical, and completely unapologetic about it.
Princess · Pastel · Magical
💻 Techie Me
A sleek silver compact packed with monitors, servers, keyboards, circuit boards, and a glowing tech dome — with a curly-haired figure standing in the center of it all. The creative tech side of me who builds things with AI.
Technology · Futuristic · Builder
🔭 Astrology Me
A rich antique-brown compact filled with celestial maps, a globe, constellation charts, crystals, potions, and candles under a starry sky. This one feels like a secret study I would never want to leave.
Astrology · Mystical · Cosmos
👽 Alien Me
A dark glowing exobiology lab compact with a green-skinned alien figure, bioluminescent crystals, space equipment, and a planet visible through the lid. What if I lived on another world entirely?
Space · Alien · Sci-Fi
🏥 Crazy Me
Polly's Quiet Care Centre, Ward 7 — a figure in a straight jacket labeled Patient Doll 1994, gray chairs, a recreation room, and a locked door. Darkly funny, completely honest. Sometimes you have to put the messy parts in the compact too.
Dark Humor · Honest · Iconic
